description: This is a screenshot of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) website's "Downloads" page, displaying the status of data download tasks. The page header includes the Copernicus and Land Monitoring Service logos, along with navigation links such as "Technical assistance", "News and Events", "Work opportunities", "CLMS portfolio", "Dataset catalogue", "Data viewer", "Use cases", and "About us". A message at the top warns of "a high load in our download process" and extended queue times due to the "successful launch of the new CLMS website". The main content area is divided into sections for download task statuses: "Queued", "In progress", "Completed", "Rejected", and "Cancelled". All sections except "Completed" show the message "There are no tasks". The "Completed" section displays a single completed task within a yellow-bordered box. This task is identified as "Task ID: 159773967", with a "Start date: 24.10.2023 11.30" and "End date: 25.10.2023 18.14". The downloaded product is specified as "Imperviousness Density (IMD) 2018 (raster 10 m and 100 m), Europe, 3-yearly - Pre-packaged". A "Download file (15.5 MB)" link is provided, and the download "Expires in 3 days".
